parsedJson.summary: The site looks like a legitimate local roofer, but the first screen makes it harder than necessary for mobile and desktop visitors to call or request a quote.

issues.title: No quote button visible on mobile
issues.what_observed: On the mobile screenshot, the top bar shows the logo, a phone icon, and a green hamburger menu, but there is no visible 'Get a Quote' button or phone number in the first screen.
issues.why_problem: A local customer searching for a Brisbane roofer on their phone wants the fastest path to call or request help. A lone phone icon can be missed or misunderstood, and hiding the quote action behind the menu adds friction at the exact moment they are deciding who to contact.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: Mobile header with a clearly labelled 'Call' or 'Get Quote' button visible without scrolling, using a tap-sized button of at least 44px height and a phone number or quote action in plain text.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Replace the icon-only mobile contact control with a sticky mobile action bar or header buttons: 'Call Now' and 'Get Quote', keeping the hamburger as a secondary control.
issues.plain_explanation: 手机页面顶部只有电话图标，没有清楚写出“立即致电”或“获取报价”。
issues.customer_impact: 很多本地客户是在手机上从 Google 商家资料点进来的，通常几秒内就决定要不要联系。如果看不到明确按钮，客户可能直接返回去点下一家屋顶公司。

issues.title: Main CTA is away from the hero message
issues.what_observed: On desktop, the orange 'GET A QUOTE' button sits in the navigation bar on the far right, while the main headline and service benefits are inside a large white hero panel on the left with no quote button inside that panel.
issues.why_problem: The visitor reads the headline and benefits first, but the next action is visually separated from that content. A Google-searching customer may understand the service but not immediately see what to do next.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: Hero section with the headline, one short trust line, and a primary 'Get a Free Roofing Quote' button directly beneath the offer, plus a secondary 'Call 07 3506 2534' action.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Add a high-contrast quote button and phone CTA inside the hero text block, directly below the trust statement and before the service list.
issues.plain_explanation: 桌面版的报价按钮离主标题太远，客户看完介绍后没有马上看到下一步。
issues.customer_impact: 客户越需要寻找按钮，越容易分心或离开。服务类网站通常要在首屏直接给出联系电话和报价入口，否则会流失准备询价的人。

issues.title: Mobile first screen is text-heavy
issues.what_observed: The mobile screenshot shows a large centered headline, two lines of italic subtext, a review sentence, and the beginning of a bullet list before any image, form, quote button, or phone number text appears.
issues.why_problem: On a phone, the first screen feels like reading instead of acting. A homeowner with a leak or urgent roofing concern may not scroll through a long list before deciding whether this business is easy to contact.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: Mobile hero with a shorter headline, one trust line such as '100+ 5-star reviews', and two clear action buttons above the fold, followed by the service list lower down.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Condense the mobile hero copy to headline plus one supporting line, move the benefits list below the first CTA row, and keep 'Call Now' and 'Get Free Quote' visible before scrolling.
issues.plain_explanation: 手机首屏文字太多，客户要先读很多内容，才可能找到下一步。
issues.customer_impact: 本地搜索客户经常边比较边快速浏览，首屏如果不能马上说明“可信”和“怎么联系”，询盘会被更直接的网站抢走。

issues.title: Hero panel hides much of the proof image
issues.what_observed: On desktop, a large white rectangular panel covers much of the left side of the roof photo, while the visible roof image and play button sit mostly on the right.
issues.why_problem: Roofing customers want visual proof that the company does real, high-quality roof work. Covering much of the project image reduces the immediate sense of workmanship and makes the page feel more templated.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: A balanced hero where the roof project image remains clearly visible, with the text block taking less width or sitting beside the image without obscuring the main roof surface.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Use a two-column desktop hero: left side concise copy and CTA, right side full visible roof/project image or video thumbnail with a caption such as 'Metal roofing in Brisbane'.
issues.plain_explanation: 桌面版的大白色文字框挡住了很多屋顶照片，实际施工效果没有充分展示出来。
issues.customer_impact: 屋顶服务是高金额决策，客户需要先看到真实工程质量。图片证据不够明显，会降低他们对专业度的信心。

issues.title: Header has too many competing items
issues.what_observed: The desktop header includes a top phone line, a full navigation row with multiple dropdown labels, an orange quote button, and a search icon all in the first screen.
issues.why_problem: A local service visitor usually needs service fit, trust, and contact options. Too many equal-weight navigation choices can distract them from the two actions that matter most: calling or requesting a quote.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: Simpler header with core links only, a prominent phone number, and one primary quote button, with less important education or search functions moved lower or into a menu.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Reduce the desktop nav to Services, Projects, Reviews, About, Contact, keep the quote button as the dominant action, and remove or de-emphasize the search icon in the top bar.
issues.plain_explanation: 顶部菜单信息太多，客户第一眼不知道应该点哪里。
issues.customer_impact: 选择太多会让人犹豫。本地服务客户通常只想确认你做不做这类活、是否可信、怎么联系；菜单越复杂，越容易错过询价。

positive_observations: The logo is clear and professional, and the green brand color fits the roofing/trade category.
The site shows a phone number on desktop and references 100+ 5-star reviews, which are useful trust signals.
The hero uses a real roof/project image rather than a generic abstract background.
redesign_priorities: 1. Add visible mobile 'Call Now' and 'Get Quote' actions above the fold.
2. Put the primary quote CTA directly inside the desktop and mobile hero area.
3. Shorten the mobile hero copy and move the benefits list below the first action row.
